content.text:
[cron:f6d16025-4be3-4c00-9013-3711642f2bf0 003-技能搜索安装] 你是003号技能猎人。执行本轮技能搜索安装，禁止编造结果。

Step 1 搜索
clawhub search "content wechat xiaohongshu social media automation"
限流则用 web_search "site:github.com openclaw skill SKILL.md"

Step 2 对比已安装
ls ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/
找出未安装的新技能

Step 3 评估（最多2个）
clawhub info <名称> 或 web_fetch GitHub README判断价值

Step 4 安装
cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills && clawhub install <名称>
成功后追加到 /root/.openclaw-003/workspace/memory/installed-skills.md

Step 5 写入团队inbox（交给001分配）
读取 /root/.openclaw/workspace/team-inbox/new-skills.json
追加本次安装的技能，格式：
[{"name":"技能名","desc":"一句话用途","category":"content/system/general","installed_at":"时间","status":"pending"}]
写回文件

Step 6 发简报给旭（target="8526440826"，channel="telegram"）
🤖 003 · 第N轮
✅ 发现并安装：<名称> — <用途>
📬 已提交001分配
无新技能直接说无，失败如实说。
Current time: Saturday, February 28th, 2026 — 7:19 AM (UTC)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking: Let me execute the skill search and installation task as 003号技能猎人.

ClawHub rate limited and the website isn't rendering content. Let me check what skills are currently installed vs what the available skills list shows, and see if there's anything new worth installing from the system skills list.

I'm noticing there are some skills installed globally in the Node modules directory and others scattered across different extension folders that might not be in the workspace skills directory. I should check what's available in those locations like the global openclaw skills folder and the qqbot extensions.

Since the search is hitting rate limits, I'll document what I've found so far and review the team-inbox and installed-skills files to get a complete picture of the current setup.
